headline: Kinder Morgan (KMI) Stock Could Be 10.6% Undervalued After Strong Earnings And Analyst Upgrades
summary: Recent interest in Kinder Morgan (KMI) has been driven by reaffirmed positive analyst views following strong quarterly results, rising earnings estimates, and commentary around its multibillion dollar project backlog and dividend support. See our latest analysis for Kinder Morgan. Kinder Morgan’s share price has eased recently, with a 30 day share price return of down 6.5% and a 90 day share price return of down 6.3%. However, the year to date share price return is 14.0% and the 5 year total...

headline: Expanded Backlog and Data Center Deals Might Change The Case For Investing In Kinder Morgan (KMI)
summary: In recent days, Kinder Morgan has attracted renewed attention as analysts reaffirmed positive ratings, highlighted stronger-than-expected quarterly earnings and revenue, and pointed to an expanded US$10.10 billion project backlog that includes new data center-related contracts. This combination of upgraded sentiment, earnings momentum, and a larger, contracted infrastructure pipeline is reinforcing investor focus on Kinder Morgan’s cash flow durability and dividend support. Next, we’ll...

headline: Here is What Barclays Thinks About Kinder Morgan (KMI)
summary: Kinder Morgan, Inc. (NYSE:KMI) is included among the 12 Best American Oil Stocks to Buy Now. Kinder Morgan, Inc. (NYSE:KMI) is one of the largest energy infrastructure companies in North America. The company is the largest independent transporter of petroleum products in the United States, transporting approximately 2.4 million barrels per day. On June 12, […]
